name: @elizaos/capacitor-desktop
description: Adds tray icons, global shortcuts, notifications, and other desktop-only controls.
author: elizaOS

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && rollup -c rollup.config.mjs

platformDetails.browser: Limited support with graceful fallbacks (notifications via Web API, clipboard, basic window ops). System tray, global shortcuts, and auto-launch unavailable.
platformDetails.node: Full support via Electrobun (system tray, global shortcuts, auto-launch, window management, power monitoring, native notifications)
